info.longName: Innovator Emerging Markets Power Buffer ETF - January

funds_data.description: The fund invests under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in investments that provide exposure to the iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (the “Underlying ETF”). FLEX Options are exchange-traded option contracts with uniquely customizable terms. It is non-diversified.
